name: CAST AI Kubernetes Optimization API
what_it_does: AI-powered Kubernetes cloud cost optimization platform with REST API — automatically rightsizing pods, switching to spot/preemptible instances, and optimizing cluster configuration in real-time, with claimed 50-70% cost reduction for Kubernetes workloads.
use_cases: Querying Kubernetes cost savings opportunities via API for FinOps reporting
Triggering automated node replacement with spot instances via API
Monitoring cluster efficiency scores and rightsizing recommendations
Managing CAST AI optimization policies programmatically via REST API
Integrating cost savings data into internal FinOps dashboards
not_for: Non-Kubernetes workloads or serverless cost optimization
Teams with strict spot-instance avoidance policies (CAST AI uses spot heavily)
Simple cost reporting without automated optimization
best_when: A platform team wants automated Kubernetes cost optimization (not just reporting) with AI-driven rightsizing and spot instance management to cut cloud bills by 50%+.
avoid_when: You can't tolerate spot instance interruptions, need only cost visibility (not automation), or run non-Kubernetes workloads.

auth.notes: API key from CAST AI console. X-API-Key header. Read and write scope distinction. Cluster-scoped keys available. Webhook for cost events and node replacement notifications. OpenAPI spec available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: cost analytics and recommendations (no automation)
pricing.paid_tiers: Autopilot: percentage of savings (typically 10-20% of savings delivered)
pricing.notes: Free tier for cost analytics and reporting. Paid tier charges percentage of savings — alignment with customer outcomes. European company (Latvia/US). Supports AWS, GCP, Azure. Savings-based pricing is unusual and attractive. Strong k8s ecosystem community. 1,000+ organizations using CAST AI.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in API reference

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with OpenAPI spec for clusters, nodes, policies, savings reports, and recommendations. API key auth with scope separation. Webhook for events. Good documentation. Optimization actions are async — poll for completion. Cluster agent must be installed for full features.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Cost and savings reads idempotent. Policy updates idempotent by policy ID. Node replacement operations create async jobs. Cluster registration idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: CAST AI agent must be installed in cluster for full optimization features
Spot instance reliance — ensure workloads handle interruptions
Savings-percentage pricing means costs scale with savings delivered
Optimization mode (read-only vs autopilot) must be set before running automation

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant. Latvian/US company — EU and US data residency. API key with scope separation. Cluster agent requires RBAC permissions — review required before production. OpenAPI spec available.
